---
title: "EUR_DATA"
toc: false
---

## Open data on European politics

EUR_DATA provides structured, analysis-ready datasets, reproducible code, and
open educational resources on European political institutions. It is an
[Erasmus+ Jean Monnet Module](about.qmd) based at University College Dublin and
maintained by the
[Connected Politics Lab](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab), integrating
the study of EU politics with hands-on data analytics.

### Available datasets

- **[Commission Formation (2024-2029)](data.qmd#commission-formation-2024-2029)**:
  the formation of the second von der Leyen Commission: the College,
  mission-letter commitments, confirmation hearings, the investiture vote, the
  2025 Work Programme, and a formation timeline. Six interlinked tables,
  1,941 rows in total.
- **[euandi 2024 (European Parliament election)](data.qmd#euandi-2024-european-parliament-election)**:
  Voting Advice Application expert coding for the June 2024 EP election, for
  Irish parties and candidates and for the EU-level party families. Eight
  tables: 19 Irish entities and 10 EU party families placed on 36 policy
  statements.
- **[Commission Agenda Implementation](data.qmd#commission-agenda-implementation)**:
  how far the Commission has delivered the legislative agenda it set itself,
  tracked as a dated time series against the EP Open Data API and EUR-Lex.
  193 agenda items, 38 tracked procedures, and a 169-procedure term corpus.

Further datasets will be added as the project develops.

### Explore

- **[Data](data.qmd)**: dataset documentation, downloads, and interactive
  visualisations.
- **[Teaching](oer.qmd)**: open syllabi, slides, and assessment materials.
- **[About](about.qmd)**: the project, its funding, and how to cite it.

### Licensing

Data and educational resources are released under
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/); code under the
[Apache License 2.0](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/LICENSE).
